libsource.description: Generic connector, double row, 02x05, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x08, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x08, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x09, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Positive 60-250mA Low Dropout Regulator, Fixed Output, SOT-23
ARM Cortex-M4 MCU, 128KB flash, 32KB RAM, 72MHz, 2-3.6V, 52 GPIO, LQFP-64
Very low capacitance ESD protection diode, 2 data-line, SOT-23-6
Four pin crystal, GND on pins 2 and 4, small symbol
